---
repo: acme/platform
role: Senior Software Engineer
period: 2022-03 to 2024-09
---

Acme's primary data platform monorepo. ~1,200 commits attributed to me
across 32 months. Highlights:

- Owner of `services/ingestor` and `services/dedup` for the entire tenure.
- Designed and shipped the multi-tenant routing layer (`packages/routing`).
- Major contributor to the migration scripts (`scripts/k8s-migrate-*`).
